shortDescription:
DUN-TFC-TDF-W : spectrogram-based dense U-Net with time-distributed FCs

Architectural specifications :
- W-variant from vanilla DUN-TFC-TDF : shared channels into one U-Net instead of stem-wise U-Nets
- 9 blocks of 3 internal layers with identity as last activation (CaC configuration)
- First and last convolutional blocks are pointwise blocks (do not handle the last frequency bin anymore)
- 6 stems prediction
- Activation is ReLU in TFC-TDF blocks with bias enabled
- All other parameters are default

Training specifications :
The model has been trained on the full Yousing dataset (sr=44100Hz).
Batches of size 4 of 3s audio clips randomly mixed with Adam optimizer.
Two phases : from scratch with L2 on spectrogram, then fine-tuning with L1 on spectrogram.

Inference tips :
1. Load stereo waveform
2. Generate STFT and stack real and imaginary channels
3. Feed in the model
4. Do the iSTFT

An overlap may be needed for small slices where outer bins are discarded.
